name: Chicken & Wine/Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt, pepper, thyme, majoram, and paprika on the quartered chicken.
2. Place the chicken in the bottom of the Crockpot.
3. Chop the garlic clove and add to the pot.
4. Peel and slice the large onion and layer the onion rings over the chicken.
5. Cut the white part of 2 leeks into rings and place in the pot.
6. Add the chunks of carrots on top.
7. Dissolve 1 tablespoon cornstarch in 1 cup chicken broth together with 1 cup sour cream and pour into the pot along with 1/2 cup dry white wine.
8. Cook on HIGH for about 3 hours OR on LOW for about 6 hours.
9. Mix together 1 cup Baking Mix, about 8 tablespoons milk, parsley, salt, pepper, and paprika to taste; form into balls and place on top of the chicken mixture during the last 30 to 40 minutes of cooking.
